fieldValues.value: ext:discovery implementors must return a superset of expected results for content-match fixture scenarios (exactMatch: false)

An implementation that declares ext:discovery MUST pass all content-match conformance scenarios (exactMatch: false) from the fixture at srs/conformance/discovery/scenarios.json. For each such scenario, the implementation's result set for the specified query MUST be a superset of the specified expectedInstanceIds set — every instance in expectedInstanceIds must appear in the result set, but the implementation may additionally return other instances.

Content-match scenarios use superset (not exact) matching because I-012-3 explicitly permits extra results beyond the recall floor. The superset requirement is the minimum that can be guaranteed: every instance reachable by the NFC+lowercase substring test must appear.
